action.description:
Introduced by Senators Pfaff, Dassler-Alfheim, Hesselbein, Ratcliff, Roys, Smith, Spreitzer, Wall and Wirch; 
cosponsored by Representatives Billings, Arney, Clancy, DeSmidt, Goodwin, Miresse, Moore Omokunde, Neubauer, Prado, Roe, Sinicki, Snodgrass, Spaude, Stubbs, Udell and Joers
